creator: jasone@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Note the -I/usr/src/lib/libc/i386 in the command line that fails.  linuxthreads 
will not compile if there is no source code for libc or gcc available.  Perhaps 
there is a way to make the reason for failure more obvious, but compilation 
would still fail.
